title: Design System: Claread Cross-Client Design System

display.purpose: Brand moments, landing headlines, share covers, major artifacts.

reading.purpose: English paragraphs, examples, article titles and exported reading material.

body.purpose: Chinese explanations, controls, menus and utility surfaces.

shadows.name: paper-lift
shadows.purpose: Cards, note slips, small reader panels.

shadows.name: floating-note
shadows.purpose: Word popup, grammar note, contextual toolbar.

shadows.name: artifact-preview
shadows.purpose: Export preview, PDF or long-image composition.

motion.name: reader-out
motion.purpose: Reader notes, floating explanations and quiet transitions.

motion.name: artifact-reveal
motion.purpose: Share/export preview transitions and material reveal moments.

components.name: Reading Surface
components.description: The central article surface where Claread must feel like a calm reading lens.
components.html:
The world's largest ever digital camera has become operational

Astronomers will now commence a period of testing before the observatory begins its work.
components.css: .ds-reading-surface { max-width: 760px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 56px 40px; background: #FAF9F6; color: #111111; } .ds-reading-surface h1 { font: 650 42px/1.18 Source Serif Pro, Georgia, serif; margin: 0 0 32px; letter-spacing: normal; } .ds-reading-surface p { font: 400 20px/1.85 Source Serif Pro, Georgia, serif; margin: 0; }

components.name: Explanation Note
components.description: Structured AI output presented as an edited note, not a chat message.
components.html:
主谓宾结构

这句话的主干是 The camera has become operational，地点状语补充背景。
components.css: .ds-explanation-note { width: 320px; padding: 20px 24px; border-radius: 18px; background: #FFFFFF; color: #111111; box-shadow: 0 4px 18px rgba(17,17,17,0.05); border: 1px solid rgba(17,17,17,0.06); } .ds-explanation-note strong { display: block; font: 650 15px/1.35 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Inter, PingFang SC, sans-serif; margin-bottom: 10px; } .ds-explanation-note p { margin: 0; font: 400 14px/1.65 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Inter, PingFang SC, sans-serif; color: #3F3F3F; }

components.name: Lens Accent
components.description: A focused blue light used sparingly for brand moments and active syntax focus.
components.css: .ds-lens-accent { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; height: 28px; padding: 0 10px; border-radius: 8px; background: #155CFF; color: #FFFFFF; font: 650 12px/1 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Inter, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.02em; box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(21,92,255,0.18); }

components.name: Artifact Preview
components.description: A share/export object that can be more expressive while staying editorial.
components.html:
Claread Grammar X-Ray

Long Sentence Breakdown

主干、修饰关系和语义层级被整理成可分享的精读笔记。
components.css: .ds-artifact-preview { width: 360px; padding: 32px; border-radius: 24px; background: #FBF9F4; color: #111111; border: 1px solid #EAE7DF; box-shadow: 0 24px 80px rgba(17,17,17,0.14); } .ds-artifact-preview small { display: block; color: #155CFF; font: 700 11px/1.2 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Inter, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 18px; } .ds-artifact-preview h2 { margin: 0 0 16px; font: 650 30px/1.12 Source Serif Pro, Georgia, serif; } .ds-artifact-preview p { margin: 0; font: 400 15px/1.7 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Inter, PingFang SC, sans-serif; color: #4A4A4A; }

narrative.overview: Claread 的跨端设计系统不是某一种固定页面结构，而是一套可识别的阅读体验原则。小程序、Web、未来 App、分享图和 PDF 可以长得不同，但都应像同一枚阅读镜头照出的结果：清晰、克制、精密、有质感。
keyCharacteristics: Grammar and sentence structure are visible, anchored, and beautiful.
AI output is edited into pages, notes, and artifacts, not dumped as chat.
Every client can adapt its shell, but must keep Claread's calm confidence.

rules.name: The Lens Blue Rule
rules.body: Blue is the brand light, not the background. If a whole screen turns blue, the brand loses its precision.

rules.name: The Reader Serif Rule
rules.body: Use serif type where the user is reading language. Use sans where the user is operating the product.

rules.name: The Text Wins Rule
rules.body: If elevation makes the UI object more noticeable than the article, reduce it.

dos: Do make the article and its anchored explanations the center of every reading experience.
Do use Claread's lens metaphor to guide focus, clarity and reveal behavior.
Do make grammar and sentence analysis visually memorable.
donts: Don't define Claread by a fixed sidebar, fixed dashboard, fixed card grid or fixed mobile layout.
Don't make Web copy the miniprogram UI, and don't make miniprogram inherit Web complexity.
Don't turn the Reader into Word, WPS, a database dashboard, or a generic AI chat.
